diary_entries.entry: Population: 24. Critical equipment malfunction. I spent the year on coding. Closest to Iris.
Year 44 on Mars. Critical equipment malfunction. Morale is hopeful. We have 948 food units left.
Another year. Critical equipment malfunction. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Lyra (year 44): 'I wonder if the data sloshing through our colony is someone else's frame output becoming our frame input.'
